layout.title: Nuxt Template Demo
layout.description: Nuxt demo keeps framework conventions while showing API layering and Element Plus Nuxt module integration.

dev.description: Start Nuxt dev server with HMR.

items.config: Nuxt modules and runtime config entry.
items.layout: Demo layout with tab and locale controls.
items.guide: Guide page for onboarding and conventions.
items.example: Business example page that wires store and component.
items.request: Nuxt request adapter based on ofetch.
items.store: Module state model and async action boundaries.

items.step1: Read nuxt.config.ts to understand module/runtime setup.
items.step2: Read src/pages/demo.vue for layout and route shell.
items.step3: Read src/pages/demo/guide.vue and example.vue for page responsibilities.
items.step4: Read src/stores/demo/index.ts for state and flow.
items.step5: Read src/api/request.ts and src/api/demo.ts for API layering (endpoint prefix: /api/template-demo/*).
